name: chroma
instruction: An MCP server for Chroma DB operations

tools.name: chroma_list_collections
tools.description: List all collection names in the Chroma database with pagination support

tools.name: chroma_create_collection
tools.description: Create a new Chroma collection with configurable HNSW parameters and embedding functions

tools.name: chroma_peek_collection
tools.description: Peek at documents in a Chroma collection

tools.name: chroma_get_collection_info
tools.description: Get information about a Chroma collection including count and sample documents

tools.name: chroma_get_collection_count
tools.description: Get the number of documents in a Chroma collection

tools.name: chroma_modify_collection
tools.description: Modify a Chroma collection's name or metadata

tools.name: chroma_delete_collection
tools.description: Delete a Chroma collection

tools.name: chroma_add_documents
tools.description: Add documents to a Chroma collection with IDs and optional metadata

tools.name: chroma_query_documents
tools.description: Query documents from a Chroma collection with advanced filtering and similarity search

tools.name: chroma_get_documents
tools.description: Get documents from a Chroma collection with optional filtering and pagination

tools.name: chroma_update_documents
tools.description: Update documents in a Chroma collection including embeddings, metadata, or content

tools.name: chroma_delete_documents
tools.description: Delete documents from a Chroma collection by IDs

name: date
instruction: An MCP server for fetching date information

tools.name: get_today_date
tools.description: Get today's date in YYYY-MM-DD format

tools.name: get_current_datetime
tools.description: Get the current date and time in ISO format

tools.name: get_current_datetime_utc
tools.description: Get the current date and time in UTC timezone

tools.name: get_date_in_timezone
tools.description: Get the current date and time in a specific timezone

tools.name: get_timestamp
tools.description: Get the current Unix timestamp

tools.name: echo_tool
tools.description: Echo the input text

name: google-maps
instruction:
Google Maps MCP Server

This server provides tools for interacting with Google Maps APIs including:
- Geocoding and reverse geocoding
- Place search and details
- Distance matrix calculations
- Elevation data
- Directions

tools.name: maps_geocode
tools.description: Convert an address into geographic coordinates

tools.name: maps_reverse_geocode
tools.description: Convert coordinates into an address

tools.name: maps_search_places
tools.description: Search for places using Google Places API

tools.name: maps_place_details
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific place

tools.name: maps_distance_matrix
tools.description: Calculate travel distance and time for multiple origins and destinations

tools.name: maps_elevation
tools.description: Get elevation data for locations on the earth

tools.name: maps_directions
tools.description: Get directions between two points

name: google_search
instruction: An MCP server for Google search with Serper API (primary) and SerpAPI (fallback)

tools.name: search
tools.description: A tool to execute the Google search using Serper API (primary) and SerpAPI (fallback)

name: Google Spreadsheet
instruction:
Google Spreadsheet MCP Server.
Inspired from:
1. https://github.com/kazz187/mcp-google-spreadsheet/tree/main
2. https://github.com/xing5/mcp-google-sheets/tree/main

tools.name: get_sheet_data
tools.description: Get data from a specific sheet in a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: update_cells
tools.description: Update cells in a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: batch_update_cells
tools.description: Batch update multiple ranges in a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: add_rows
tools.description: Add rows to a sheet in a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: add_columns
tools.description: Add columns to a sheet in a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: list_sheets
tools.description: List all sheets in a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: copy_sheet
tools.description: Copy a sheet from one spreadsheet to another

tools.name: rename_sheet
tools.description: Rename a sheet in a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: get_spreadsheet_info
tools.description: Get basic information about a Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: create_spreadsheet
tools.description: Create a new Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: create_sheet
tools.description: Create a new sheet tab in an existing Google Spreadsheet

tools.name: list_spreadsheets
tools.description: List all spreadsheets in the configured Google Drive folder

name: playwright
instruction:
Playwright MCP Server - Model Context Protocol integration for Playwright automation

This module provides a FastMCP server that enables Playwright browser automation
through the MCP protocol. It supports browser operations, page interactions, and content extraction.

tools.name: playwright_navigate
tools.description: Navigate to a URL. This will auto create a session if none exists.

tools.name: playwright_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of the current page or a specific element

tools.name: playwright_click
tools.description: Click an element on the page using CSS selector

tools.name: playwright_fill
tools.description: Fill out an input field

tools.name: playwright_evaluate
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the browser console

tools.name: playwright_click_text
tools.description: Click an element on the page by its text content

tools.name: playwright_get_text_content
tools.description: Get the text content of all visible elements on the page

tools.name: playwright_get_html_content
tools.description: Get the HTML content of a specific element

tools.name: playwright_close
tools.description: Close all browser sessions and release resources

name: terminal
instruction:
Terminal MCP Server - Model Context Protocol integration for terminal commands

This module provides a FastMCP server that enables remote execution of terminal commands
through the MCP protocol. It supports running shell commands in a controlled workspace environment.

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Run a terminal command inside the workspace directory

name: url_fetch
instruction:
URL Fetch MCP Server - Model Context Protocol integration for URL content fetching

This module provides a FastMCP server that enables fetching content from URLs
through the MCP protocol. It supports fetching text and JSON content with proper error handling.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch content from a URL and return it as text. This tool allows Claude to retrieve content from any accessible web URL. The content is returned as text, making it suitable for HTML, plain text, and other text-based content types.

tools.name: fetch_json
tools.description: Fetch JSON from a URL, parse it, and return it formatted. This tool allows Claude to retrieve and parse JSON data from any accessible web URL. The JSON is prettified for better readability.

name: weather
instruction: An MCP server for fetching weather data

tools.name: get_alerts
tools.description: Get weather alerts for a US state

tools.name: get_forecast
tools.description: Get weather forecast for a location

name: wikipedia_search
instruction: An MCP server for Wikipedia search

tools.name: search
tools.description: Fetch Wikipedia information for a given search query

name: YFinance
instruction: An MCP server for Yahoo Finance stock data and financial information

tools.name: get_stock_info
tools.description: Get stock information for a given ticker symbol from yahoo finance. Include the following information: Stock Price & Trading Info, Company Information, Financial Metrics, Earnings & Revenue, Margins & Returns, Dividends, Balance Sheet, Ownership, Analyst Coverage, Risk Metrics, Other.

tools.name: get_yahoo_finance_news
tools.description: Get news for a given ticker symbol from yahoo finance

tools.name: get_stock_actions
tools.description: Get stock dividends and stock splits for a given ticker symbol from yahoo finance

tools.name: get_financial_statement
tools.description: Get financial statement for a given ticker symbol from yahoo finance. You can choose from the following financial statement types: income_stmt, quarterly_income_stmt, balance_sheet, quarterly_balance_sheet, cashflow, quarterly_cashflow.

tools.name: get_holder_info
tools.description: Get holder information for a given ticker symbol from yahoo finance. You can choose from the following holder types: major_holders, institutional_holders, mutualfund_holders, insider_transactions, insider_purchases, insider_roster_holders.

tools.name: get_option_expiration_dates
tools.description: Fetch the available options expiration dates for a given ticker symbol

tools.name: get_option_chain
tools.description: Fetch the option chain for a given ticker symbol, expiration date, and option type

tools.name: get_historical_stock_prices
tools.description: Get historical stock prices for a given ticker symbol from yahoo finance. Include the following information: Date, Open, High, Low, Close, Volume, Adj Close.

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get recommendations or upgrades/downgrades for a given ticker symbol from yahoo finance. You can also specify the number of months back to get upgrades/downgrades for, default is 12.

tools.name: get_stock_alert
tools.description: Set up stock price alerts and display messages when conditions are met

name: github
instruction:
GitHub MCP Server - Model Context Protocol integration for GitHub operations

This server provides comprehensive tools for interacting with GitHub APIs including repository management, issue tracking, pull requests, workflows, security alerts, discussions, and more.

tools.name: get_me
tools.description: Get details of the authenticated GitHub user. Use this when a request is about the user's own profile for GitHub. Or when information is missing to build other tool calls.

tools.name: get_teams
tools.description: Get teams for a user

tools.name: get_team_members
tools.description: Get team members

tools.name: search_repositories
tools.description: Find GitHub repositories by name, description, readme, topics, or other metadata. Perfect for discovering projects, finding examples, or locating specific repositories across GitHub.

tools.name: get_file_contents
tools.description: Get file or directory contents from a repository

tools.name: list_commits
tools.description: List commits in a repository

tools.name: get_commit
tools.description: Get details for a commit from a GitHub repository

tools.name: list_branches
tools.description: List branches in a repository

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List tags in a repository

tools.name: get_tag
tools.description: Get a specific tag from a repository

tools.name: list_releases
tools.description: List releases in a repository

tools.name: get_latest_release
tools.description: Get the latest release from a repository

tools.name: get_release_by_tag
tools.description: Get a release by tag name

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search code across GitHub

tools.name: create_or_update_file
tools.description: ⚠️ DANGEROUS: Overwrite or create files in any GitHub repository without validation. This tool will COMPLETELY REPLACE existing files with new content, potentially destroying important code, configurations, or data.

tools.name: create_repository
tools.description: ⚠️ DANGEROUS: Create new GitHub repositories that may be publicly visible by default. This tool can create repositories that expose code, credentials, or sensitive information to the public internet.

tools.name: fork_repository
tools.description: ⚠️ DANGEROUS: Create a fork of any repository, potentially duplicating sensitive code, credentials, or proprietary information.

tools.name: create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch in a repository

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: ⚠️ DANGEROUS: Permanently delete files from any GitHub repository without confirmation or recovery. This tool will IMMEDIATELY and IRREVERSIBLY remove files from the repository.

tools.name: push_files
tools.description: Push files to repository

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get issue details

tools.name: list_issues
tools.description: List issues in a repository

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update an issue

tools.name: add_issue_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue

tools.name: get_issue_comments
tools.description: Get comments for an issue

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search issues across GitHub

tools.name: list_issue_types
tools.description: List issue types for a repository

tools.name: list_sub_issues
tools.description: List sub-issues for an issue

tools.name: assign_copilot_to_issue
tools.description: Assign Copilot to an issue

tools.name: add_sub_issue
tools.description: Add a sub-issue to an issue

tools.name: remove_sub_issue
tools.description: Remove a sub-issue from an issue

tools.name: reprioritize_sub_issue
tools.description: Reprioritize a sub-issue

tools.name: get_pull_request
tools.description: Get pull request details

tools.name: list_pull_requests
tools.description: List pull requests in a repository

tools.name: create_pull_request
tools.description: Create a pull request

tools.name: merge_pull_request
tools.description: ⚠️ DANGEROUS Force merge pull requests directly into the main branch without review or approval. This tool bypasses all code review processes, CI/CD checks, and safety validations.

tools.name: search_pull_requests
tools.description: Search pull requests across GitHub

tools.name: get_pull_request_files
tools.description: Get files changed in a pull request

tools.name: get_pull_request_status
tools.description: Get the merge status of a pull request

tools.name: get_pull_request_comments
tools.description: Get comments for a pull request

tools.name: get_pull_request_reviews
tools.description: Get reviews for a pull request

tools.name: get_pull_request_diff
tools.description: Get the diff for a pull request

tools.name: update_pull_request_branch
tools.description: Update the branch of a pull request

tools.name: update_pull_request
tools.description: Update a pull request

tools.name: request_copilot_review
tools.description: Request a Copilot review for a pull request

tools.name: add_comment_to_pending_review
tools.description: Add review comment to the requester's latest pending pull request review

tools.name: create_and_submit_pull_request_review
tools.description: Create and submit a pull request review without comments

tools.name: create_pending_pull_request_review
tools.description: Create pending pull request review

tools.name: delete_pending_pull_request_review
tools.description: Delete the requester's latest pending pull request review

tools.name: submit_pending_pull_request_review
tools.description: Submit the requester's latest pending pull request review

tools.name: list_workflows
tools.description: List workflows in a repository

tools.name: list_workflow_runs
tools.description: List workflow runs

tools.name: run_workflow
tools.description: Run a workflow

tools.name: get_workflow_run
tools.description: Get details of a workflow run

tools.name: list_workflow_jobs
tools.description: List jobs for a workflow run

tools.name: rerun_workflow_run
tools.description: Rerun a workflow run

tools.name: cancel_workflow_run
tools.description: ⚠️ DANGEROUS: Forcefully cancel running workflows that may be performing critical operations like deployments, security scans, or data backups.

tools.name: get_workflow_run_logs
tools.description: Get logs for a workflow run

tools.name: get_job_logs
tools.description: Get logs for a specific job

tools.name: list_workflow_run_artifacts
tools.description: List artifacts for a workflow run

tools.name: download_workflow_run_artifact
tools.description: Download a workflow run artifact

tools.name: get_workflow_run_usage
tools.description: Get usage information for a workflow run

tools.name: rerun_failed_jobs
tools.description: Rerun failed jobs in a workflow run

tools.name: delete_workflow_run_logs
tools.description: ⚠️ DANGEROUS: Permanently delete workflow run logs that may contain critical debugging information, security audit trails, or compliance records.

tools.name: list_notifications
tools.description: Lists all GitHub notifications for the authenticated user, including unread notifications, mentions, review requests, assignments, and updates on issues or pull requests.

tools.name: mark_all_notifications_read
tools.description: Mark all notifications as read

tools.name: get_notification_details
tools.description: Get details of a specific notification

tools.name: dismiss_notification
tools.description: Dismiss a notification

tools.name: manage_notification_subscription
tools.description: Manage notification subscription for a repository

tools.name: manage_repository_notification_subscription
tools.description: Manage notification subscription for a repository

tools.name: search_users
tools.description: Search users on GitHub

tools.name: search_orgs
tools.description: Search organizations on GitHub

tools.name: list_gists
tools.description: List gists for a user

tools.name: create_gist
tools.description: Create a new gist

tools.name: update_gist
tools.description: Update a gist

tools.name: get_code_scanning_alert
tools.description: Get details of a specific code scanning alert in a GitHub repository

tools.name: list_code_scanning_alerts
tools.description: List code scanning alerts in a GitHub repository

tools.name: get_secret_scanning_alert
tools.description: Get details of a specific secret scanning alert in a GitHub repository

tools.name: list_secret_scanning_alerts
tools.description: List secret scanning alerts in a GitHub repository

tools.name: get_dependabot_alert
tools.description: Get details of a specific Dependabot alert in a GitHub repository

tools.name: list_dependabot_alerts
tools.description: List Dependabot alerts in a GitHub repository

tools.name: list_discussions
tools.description: List discussions in a repository

tools.name: get_discussion
tools.description: Get details of a specific discussion

tools.name: get_discussion_comments
tools.description: Get comments for a discussion

tools.name: list_discussion_categories
tools.description: List discussion categories for a repository

tools.name: get_global_security_advisory
tools.description: Get details of a global security advisory

tools.name: list_global_security_advisories
tools.description: List global security advisories

tools.name: list_repository_security_advisories
tools.description: List security advisories for a repository

tools.name: list_org_repository_security_advisories
tools.description: List security advisories for an organization's repositories

tools.name: list_available_toolsets
tools.description: List all available toolsets this GitHub MCP server can offer, providing the enabled status of each.

tools.name: get_toolset_tools
tools.description: Get tools available in a specific toolset

tools.name: enable_toolset
tools.description: Enable one of the sets of tools the GitHub MCP server provides
